==Key Clue Records Sky City==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Parsia]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.
Please note that requirements ending with a * are an approximation, due to all the AFFCT reduction being applied.

==Hanging Gardens==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gold Bar, +2}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements
|-
|Conquer Business Zone||Dominate Business Zone
|-
|Conquer Metropolis||Dominate Metropolis
|-
|Conquer Financial Center||Dominate Financial Center
|}

==Business Empire==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +100}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Tattered Work Clothes (No-Fly Zone)||CIV 17800*||Business Empire Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Remains in the Airship (Residential Sector)||ART 17940*||Business Empire Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|-
|Floating Villa (Skyport)||TECH 18340*||Business Empire Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +20}}
|}

==Infinite Energy==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Tool Chest, +100}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Light Warrior's Remains (Skyport)||ART 18070*||Infinite Energy +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}
|-
|Energy Operator (Industrial Grid)||FAME 14410*||Infinite Energy +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Operator Soul, +1}}
|-
|Power Plant (Power Nexus)||TECH 17200*||Infinite Energy +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Intel, +1500}}
|}

==Brain-Machine Project==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Drone (No-Fly Zone)||TECH 17870*||Brain-Machine Project Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Abandoned Mailbox (Skyport)||CIV 17470*||Brain-Machine Project Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|-
|Unidentified Corpse (Industrial Grid)||ART 18410*||Brain-Machine Project Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +20}}
|-
|Data Center (Commerce Ring)||TECH 16400*||Brain-Machine Project Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|}

==Financial Crisis==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +600}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Midas Toad Mallet Relic}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements
|-
|Redeem all [[Parsia Cards#Tier 1 (White)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 10 white card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Parsia Cards#Tier 2 (Green)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 10 green card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Parsia Cards#Tier 3 (Blue)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 9 blue card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Parsia Cards#Tier 4 (Purple)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 9 purple card items
|-
|Redeem all [[Parsia Cards#Tier 5 (Orange)|limited cards (white)]]
|Exchange all 8 orange card items
|}

==Android Uprising==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +6h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Abandoned Research Lab (Industrial Grid)||CIV 17670*||Android Uprising Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent, +30}}
|-
|Casino Suitcase (Pleasure Dome)||FAME 18410*||Android Uprising Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +20}}
|-
|Luxury Apartment (?)||TECH 12700*||Android Uprising Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|}

==Slipper Army Secrets==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Tool Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +10}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Artificial Life Incubator (?)||CIV 15880*||Slipper Army Secrets Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Heavy Armor Totem (Military Precinct)||FTH 18410*||Slipper Army Secrets Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|-
|Monument Stone Statue (?)||TECH 12700*||Slipper Army Secrets Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Bronze Colossus (?)||FTH 14800*||Slipper Army Secrets Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|}

==80/20 Rule==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Deranged Debtor (No-Fly Zone)||FAME 18740*||80/20 Rule Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Soul Chest, +30}}
|-
|Delusional Man (?)||FAME? 13020*||80/20 Rule Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Debt Collector (?)||TECH 12700*||80/20 Rule Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|High-Tech Briefcase (Metropole)||TECH 17800*||80/20 Rule Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Gear Chest, +20}}
|-
|Overworked Corpse (Financier's Core)||ART 18670*||80/20 Rule Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|}

==Twin Cities War==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +60}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Twisted Remains (Residential Sector)||ART 18230*||Twin Cities War Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Pipeline Entrance (Pleasure Dome)||FAME 17470*||Twin Cities War Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Employment Office (Power Nexus)||CIV 17740*||Twin Cities War Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Fungi Chest, +20}}
|-
|War Room (?)||FTH 14800*||Twin Cities War Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|}

==Floating Tribunal==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +20}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Faith Pavillion (Residential Sector)||?||Floating Tribunal Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Thought Pavillion (Pleasure Dome)||Display Relic: Art >110. Example: {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Wheat|orange}}||Floating Tribunal Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Law Pavillion (Metropole)||CIV 17880*||Floating Tribunal Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +10}}
|-
|War Pavillion (?)||FTH 14800*||Floating Tribunal Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|}

==Illegal Funds==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Demon's Crate (Skyport)||TECH 17470*||Illegal Funds Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +10}}
|-
|Arms Factory (?)||FAME? 13020*||Illegal Funds Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Charred Remains (?)||TECH 12700*||Illegal Funds Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|}

==Parsian Masquerade==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +60}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Luxury Villa (?)||CIV 15880*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Collapsed Basement (?)||FAME? 13020*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Black Briefcase (?)||TECH 12700*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|}

==Triple Spy Game==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Encrypted Letter (?)||CIV 15880*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Warehouse Base (?)||FAME? 13020*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Floating Hot-Air Balloon (?)||TECH 12700*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|Dying Traveler (?)||FTH 14800*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|}

==Sky Fortress==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Tool Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Anti-Air Military Schematics (Pleasure Dome)||FTH 18270*||Sky Fortress Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Sky Elevator (?)||FAME? 13020*||Sky Fortress Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Skyrail Chronicles (?)||TECH 12700*||Sky Fortress Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|}

==Laws of the Sky==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +6h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Penance Church (?)||CIV 15880*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Sacred Flame Altar (?)||FAME? 13020*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Supreme Codex (?)||TECH 12700*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|Hamster Statue (?)||FTH 14800*||Resistance Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|}

==Hall of 100 Columns==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, 40 [[Lion Oath Ring Relic Frag]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Pillar of the Sun (?)||CIV 15880*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Moon Pillar (Residential Sector)||FTH 18210*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Ahura's Pillar (Skyport)||TECH 12700*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +10}}
|-
|Pillar of Life (Metropole)||FAME 19140*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +80}}
|-
|Pillar of Kings (Commerce Ring)||FTH 18070*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +20}}
|-
|Weathered Body (Financier's Core)||ART 17670*||Hall of 100 Columns Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|}

==Mermaid's Tale==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Wish Coin, +2}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +6h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Merman Remains (?)||CIV 15880*||Mermaid's Tale Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Mermaid Exhibit (?)||FAME? 13020*||Mermaid's Tale Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Antique Vase (Power Nexus)||CIV 19070*||Mermaid's Tale Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Fouled Research Case (Military Precinct)||TECH 18470*||Mermaid's Tale Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +20m}}
|}

==Eternal Flame==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Wish Coin, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Forgotten Sanctuary (Metropole)||Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Behistun Inscription|purple}}||Eternal Flame Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|Steel Airship (?)||FAME? 13020*||Eternal Flame Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Green Organ Slime, +30}}
|-
|Steel Temple (?)||TECH 12700*||Eternal Flame Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|Babel Library (?)||FTH 14800*||Eternal Flame Intel +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|}

==Ad Chip Mandate==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +60}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!Requirements!!Rewards
|-
|Hamster Loan Ad (Pleasure Dome)||Watch Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|-
|Parsian Dance Ad (Residential Sector)||Watch Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}
|-
|Rebel Recruitment (Metropole)||Watch Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +10m}}
|-
|Mermaid Show Billboard (Industrial Grid)||Watch Ad||{{RewardIconWithText|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|}

==Sky City's Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Treasure Map, +50}},{{RewardIconWithText|Parsia Arcana Fragment, +1}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event!!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found!!Rewards
|-
|Parsian Flying Carpet (No-Fly Zone)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}
|-
|Cavalry Saddlebag (No-Fly Zone)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Novice Scroll, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Parsian Brocade (Skyport)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Parsian Miniature (Skyport)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}
|-
|Barber Membership Card (Residential Sector)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Relic of the Sacred Flame (Residential Sector)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}
|-
|Industrial Cargo Crate (No-Fly Zone)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Gear Chest, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Assassin's Satchel (No-Fly Zone)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +20k}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Dancer's Veil (Pleasure Dome)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +30}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|-
|Casino Chips (Pleasure Dome)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Novice Scroll, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Divine Maiden's Reliquary (Power Nexus)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|-
|Energy Ore (Power Nexus)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}
|-
|Golden Slippers (Military Precinct)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|-
|Sole Rebels Supply Box (Military Precinct)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|-
|Tycoon's Gift (Commerce Ring)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +2}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|-
|Golden Wine Set (Commerce Ring)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +20}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|-
|HamsterBank Gift (Metropole)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|-
|HamsterCorp Lucky Bag (Metropole)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|-
|Three-Legged Golden Toad (Financier's Core)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +3h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|-
|Lucky Gold (Financier's Core)||3||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +30k}}, {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}
|}
